mapper.select: SELECT * FROM parameter_standards WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM parameter_standards WHERE status IN #{s} ORDER BY published_at DESC
SELECT * FROM parameter_standards ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parameter_standards (title, category, software, software_type_id, software_version, code, status, version, content, rendered_content, previous_content, previous_rendered_content, published_at, pending_review_record_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{category}, #{software}, #{softwareTypeId}, #{softwareVersion}, #{code}, #{status}, #{version}, #{content}, #{renderedContent}, #{previousContent}, #{previousRenderedContent}, #{publishedAt}, #{pendingReviewRecordId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE parameter_standards SET title=#{title}, category=#{category}, software=#{software}, software_type_id=#{softwareTypeId}, software_version=#{softwareVersion}, code=#{code}, status=#{status}, version=#{version}, content=#{content}, rendered_content=#{renderedContent}, previous_content=#{previousContent}, previous_rendered_content=#{previousRenderedContent}, published_at=#{publishedAt}, pending_review_record_id=#{pendingReviewRecordId}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
